## Summary
I've renamed all occurrences in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py`:
**Changes made:** - Line 193: `ctx.plan_backend.find_sessions_for_managed_pr` → `ctx.pr_backend.find_sessions_for_managed_pr`
The file contained only one instance of `plan_backend` (and no instances of `require_plan_backend`). This was an attribute access on the `ctx` object where the deprecated fallback code tries to fetch sessions from the local JSONL reprocessing path.
The rename follows the task requirements: - Changed the internal attribute reference from `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` - Did not modify any external API field names, user-facing string messages, or comments - Preserved all other code structure and formatting
